narrative: Fed 3.75%. This macro shock anchors a critical G10 bilateral theme as GBP (+0.796% 1W avg) outperforms USD (-0.696% 1W avg, 1.492% spread), lifting GBP/USD to 1.3355. Meanwhile, suspected BoJ intervention triggers a sharp USD/JPY reversal to 161.31, though the +268bp OIS carry advantage still favors USD. Watch the RBNZ rate decision on July 8 for the next major policy catalyst.
